verdict.headline: Do not transact — this address is on the OFAC SDN sanctions list and linked to Tornado Cash.
verdict.reasoning: Sanctions screening returned a confirmed match against two programs (OFAC SDN and Tornado Cash) with a high risk level, which is a hard veto regardless of any other signals. The on-chain history shows a zero ETH balance, consistent with a dormant or drained sanctioned address, providing no offsetting positive evidence. Labels and web sentiment returned only API descriptors rather than meaningful data, but they cannot override the sanctions hit. Sending funds to this wallet would likely constitute a sanctions violation.

findings.finding: Confirmed sanctions match against OFAC SDN and Tornado Cash programs (risk_level: high). Transacting may violate sanctions law.
Label provider returned only API metadata; no usable named-entity labels were resolved for this address.
Wallet currently holds 0 ETH; no activity signal that could offset the sanctions hit.
Web sentiment endpoint returned only service metadata; no specific reputation findings retrieved, but cannot override sanctions match.

services.rationale: Resource 0 (api.anchor-x402.com) is the strongest pick: 0% recent failure rate, inputInfoCompleteness of 2/3, and the lowest price ($0.001) among all candidates with confirmed real-world performance.
Resource 1 (crypto-address-labeler) is the only labels candidate with a confirmed 0% failure rate, making it the clear winner despite all candidates sharing the same low inputInfoCompleteness of 1/3.

Resource 1 (wallet-api balance endpoint) is the sole candidate with both a 0% recent failure rate and the highest inputInfoCompleteness (2/3), making it clearly preferable over all untested alternatives.

Resource 2 (address-reputation-score) is preferred over the 100%-failing resource 1 and the description-mismatched resource 0; it is untested but provides a genuine reputation/sentiment signal and avoids the confirmed failure of resource 1.
